title: Zygopetalum wailesianum
taxonomy: Zygopetalum wailesianum is classified as a species of orchid in the family Orchidaceae. This epiphytic orchid is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It belongs to the genus Zygopetalum, which consists of around 20 species. Zygopetalum wailesianum is further classified under the subtribe Cymbidiinae, a subtribe within the large orchid family Orchidaceae. Its classification provides insight into its evolutionary history and relationships with other orchid species.
